description_long: This is a two-story brick pizzeria with a flat concrete roof and boarded-up windows, giving it an abandoned or derelict appearance. The front facade features a shattered glass window, a partially open door, and wooden planks nailed across the upper windows. A graffiti-covered white van is parked to the side, and a wooden picnic table with benches and a blue trash bin are placed near the entrance. The building's lower level has a large window and door, while the upper level is characterized by smaller, uniformly spaced windows. The overall scene suggests urban decay, with visible signs of neglect and vandalism.
description: A two-story, boarded-up brick pizzeria with a flat roof, broken windows, graffiti-covered van, and outdoor picnic table, evoking urban decay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, shattered window, boarded windows, blue trash bin, picnic table, and graffiti van.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the van, boarded side windows, and partial view of the picnic table and trash bin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying fully boarded windows on both floors and the back of the van, with no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue trash bin, picnic table, and boarded windows, with the van partially visible.
